things.name: Ribat of Monastir
things.description: 8th-century Islamic fortress used as a film set for Monty Python's Life of Brian

things.name: Mausoleum of Habib Bourguiba
things.description: Golden-domed mausoleum of Tunisia's first president - a striking piece of architecture

things.name: Skanes Beach
things.description: Sandy Mediterranean beach with calm turquoise water adjacent to the hotel zone

things.name: Museum of Islamic Art
things.description: Collection of Islamic art and artefacts within the historic Ribat walls

things.name: Sousse Medina
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage medina 25km away with the Great Mosque and a ribat

things.name: El Jem Colosseum
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Roman amphitheatre - 3rd largest in the world

things.name: Sahara Desert Day Trip
things.description: Full day to Douz for camel riding on the sand dunes of the Sahara

things.name: Traditional Hammam
things.description: Traditional Tunisian steam bath with a full exfoliating massage

things.name: Port de Monastir
things.description: Modern marina with boat trips along the coast and watersports

things.name: Kairouan
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage holy city with the Great Mosque - the oldest in North Africa
